summary: The diff addresses both REQ-1 and REQ-2 by modifying useQueries.ts (adding retry:false, staleTime, and enabled guards for useIsCallerAdmin) and Admin.tsx (adding a timeout constant ADMIN_CHECK_TIMEOUT_MS and updated rendering logic). Most acceptance criteria appear to be met, though the truncated diff prevents full verification of some details like the timeout-based fallback implementation and the enabled guard in useIsCallerAdmin.

missing_requirements.requirement: The admin role check query in useQueries.ts has an `enabled` guard that prevents it from running until the actor and identity are fully initialized.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff summary mentions retry:false and staleTime for useIsCallerAdmin but the useQueries.ts content is truncated before the useIsCallerAdmin function is visible. We cannot confirm an explicit enabled guard checking both actor and identity initialization is present.

hallucinated_features.description: A RefreshCw icon is imported in Admin.tsx, suggesting a manual refresh or retry button was added to the admin UI.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention adding a refresh or retry button to the Admin page UI. This appears to be an extra UI feature not requested.
